text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Sweep Tosho and I are preparing
for the Tiara tour...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Enough yapping. When I say "let's go," then let's go! Hurry up and get ready! Faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho grabs me, and before I know it, I've
been tugged all the way to the art museum.
choice_data_list:
What's this exhibit? "The Beautiful Running
That Colors the Tiara"...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Did you know that looking at pictures
counts as studying?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Grandma told me that only Umamusume who really know racing can use racing magic!
choice_data_list:
(That's why she's proactively doing all this
research?!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What're you covering your mouth for?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're just so happy that I invited you to come
out with me? Wow. You're like a little kid.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But we're not here for fun! This is about learning!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Got it? Now follow me, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Staff
text_block_list.text: Two guests? May I have your tickets, please?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Familiar!
choice_data_list: One adult and one student, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I enter the exhibit and take in
the photos of Tiara tour contenders.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hm... Oka Sho... Oka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There it is! And the year my great grandma ran
waaas...

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's Air Groove in the Japanese Oaks! I really
love the way she runs.

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor B
text_block_list.text:
There are pictures of Hishi Amazon's races over
here! Man, was she tough back then.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. Hishiama and Air Groove are pretty
famous, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Here's a picture of the two of them. Hmmm...
They do make quite an impression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and Hishi Amazon created quite a
frenzy in their heyday. There are a number of
photos of them here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're both as graceful as flowers, yet with
overwhelming presences. I find myself holding my
breath just looking at their photos.

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but Hishi Amazon couldn't pull it off in the
end. Narita Brian ended up beating her in the
Arima Kinen, remember?

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
There wasn't much she could've done about that.
She was up against a Classic Triple Crown
champion.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, lady! What's that supposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean she couldn't have done
anything about it? Have you forgotten how
strong Hishiama was?

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
I guess she was pretty good. But that's just the
way things are.

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
Racers who run in the Triple Tiara tour just can't
hold a candle to those who compete in the Triple
Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor C
text_block_list.text:
I get that. It's like the ones who make it through
the Classic Triple Crown tour have escaped the
jaws of death.

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor B
text_block_list.text:
I was cheering for Fine Motion in the Arima
Kinen, but that Symboli Kris S was just too good.
Fine Motion didn't stand a chance.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
She didn't stand a chance? Because she went for
the Triple Tiara tour, and Kris S ran in the Classic
Triple Crown tour?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's why she didn't stand a chance?

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor A
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah...

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but Air Groove did have potential, don't you
think? I mean, she won the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor C
text_block_list.text:
But then she lost the Arima Kinen to someone
from the Classic Triple Crown tour—one who
didn't even win a single race.

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor C
text_block_list.text:
Her winning the fall Tenno was a pretty big deal,
sure. But that's the only race she won in her senior
year. C'mon, you can't deny the pattern.

text_block_list.name: Exhibit Visitor C
text_block_list.text:
History's proven it to be true. The title of "the
strongest" is reserved specifically for Umamusume
who have seized victory in the Classic Triple
Crown tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The aptitude and abilities you need to run in the
Classic Triple Crown tour versus the Triple Tiara
tour are fundamentally different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's impossible to say categorically that
one of the tours is better than the other. That
said...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown has a long history as
Japan's first Triple Crown series. The races are
also different lengths, and competitors have to
be able to adapt to them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the other visitors said, Triple Crown tour
runners are stronger than Tiara tour runners...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At least, according to the abundance of discourse
and race results suggesting they are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And in the midst of all this, Sweep Tosho...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Like... really?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Reeeaaally?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's so stuuuuupid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, she runs out of the exhibit and
back to my office, where she begins poring over
documents at a blistering speed!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Sweep! I put the materials about the Triple Tiara
tour you asked about over here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Rob Roy! Don't just stand there, Familiar!
Hurry up and hand them to me!
choice_data_list: O-okay, but... what's gotten into you?
O-okay, but... what's gotten into you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you hear what they said?! Don't you think
all that stuff they were saying was so dumb?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh... Here! This too! Look at this article!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me an article with the headline:
"Autumn Tenno Sho Upset: Triple Tiara
Umamusume Manages First Victory in 17 Years."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's weird, right?! "Manages"? "Upset"?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I think they're just saying that Air
Groove's accomplishment was really amazing
because it's so rare in terms of history.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but calling it an "upset" and saying she
"managed" to win is an awfully weird way to
praise someone!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's like saying it's practically a miracle she
didn't lose!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh! Seriously, what the heck?! It's stupid! It's
dumb! It's so laaaaame!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Who cares if someone's from the Classic Triple
Crown tour or the Triple Tiara tour?! It's got
nothing to do with anything!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Strength is strength! That's all that matters!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But everyone talks like people on the Classic Triple Crown tour are obviously better than everyone else! Like it's just the way things are!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: They just go on and on and on and on about it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't care about history or proof of whatever!
It's LAAAAAME!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...That's it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Listen up, Familiar. I'm gonna use racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It'll change everything! I'm gonna smash this way
of thinking to pieces and wake everyone up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if you run the Triple Crown tour
or the Tiara tour! Strength is strength! And
everyone needs to know that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone with my very own magic—my
racing magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Because magic... Well...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Magic can turn everything around! It can change
everything!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I know it can!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Got that, Familiar?! I'm not taking "no" for an
answer!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna find that magic no matter what! First,
I'm gonna search for it, then I'm gonna find it and
use it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna change the world with my very own
racing magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And you're gonna help me! Got it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This small witch has ambition tenfold the size of
her stature. And while her dream sounds more like
a fairy tale...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: We definitely, definitely will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod with as much fervor as my neck can offer. I
know we'll pull this off. After all, the magic
started the second she made up her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sweep Tosho begins her long and
arduous journey to find the magic that will
change the world.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Wow.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep... You're amazing...
